type_reps.read_via: resolve(); returned as raw str, no coercion
type_reps.notes: Pure str pass-through of os.getenv(key, default). Byte-identical characterization: unset->default, set->override.
Registry stores str; call site coerces with int(). Malformed value -> ValueError raised at call site (module import time). Empty-string value would also raise.
Threshold keys. float() coercion at call site; malformed -> ValueError.
Boolean via =="1" comparison at call site. NEVER raises: any non-'1' value (malformed, empty, unset->'0') yields False. Only literal '1' is True.

type_reps.read_via: ModelSettings field via get_model_settings() (pydantic, validation_alias, case_sensitive=True); PG_JUDGE_MODEL is str non-empty default, PG_EVALUATOR_MODEL is 'str | None' with None default
type_reps.notes: Distinct from resolve() layer. 12 model keys total. Case-sensitive: lowercase alias (pg_judge_model) is IGNORED. Fresh instance each call = live read. PG_EVALUATOR_MODEL also present in CONFIG_DEFAULTS with None default (dual-registered).

type_reps.read_via: resolve() as plain str/None -- NOT SecretStr
type_reps.notes: KEY/TOKEN/SECRET-shaped keys are plain strings, no masking. OPENROUTER_API_KEY & EXA_API_KEY have '' default; ZYTE_API_KEY has None default (returns None when unset).

Empty-string default: resolve() returns '' when unset (falsy sentinel meaning 'auto/disabled'). PG_PLANNING_GATE_MODEL & PG_POLICY_MODEL ALSO exist as ModelSettings fields with '' default (dual-registered str).

keys: <any key not in CONFIG_DEFAULTS, e.g. PG_TOTALLY_UNREGISTERED_KEY_XYZ>
type_reps.notes: resolve() raises KeyError for a key not present in CONFIG_DEFAULTS (intentional: multi-line/computed/conflicting defaults excluded, migrated manually). Verified empirically.

axes_applicable: value-state: empty-string (returns '' for str keys; ValueError for int/float-coerced call sites; False for bool =="1")
value-state: valid (override read live from env)
value-state: malformed (str: passes through raw; int/float: ValueError at call site; bool: silently False)
precedence: registry-default vs process-env override (os.getenv live read; process env wins)
precedence: .env layer EXISTS via load_dotenv() default override=False -- process env takes precedence over .env, .env over registry default
precedence: NO dedicated CLI layer in config module (a few scripts set os.environ at startup = plain process-env, not a resolve()/ModelSettings precedence tier)
key-case-sensitivity: ModelSettings uses case_sensitive=True (lowercase alias ignored); resolve()/os.getenv is inherently case-sensitive
read-timing: resolve() reads live env EVERY call; ModelSettings SNAPSHOTS env at construction, but get_model_settings() returns a FRESH instance per call => effectively live
runtime-type: str (resolve plain) vs coerced-at-callsite (int/float/bool) vs pydantic-typed (ModelSettings str / str|None). NO SecretStr type in this codebase
result.baseline: 16738 tests collected, 11 collection errors (via /home/polaris/conda_cu128/bin/python -m pytest --collect-only at /home/polaris/wt/phase-1b on branch chore/review-readiness-1b). Errors are pre-existing collection failures (playwright TargetClosedError, mesh/benchmark import errors) unrelated to config. Worktree created, oracle overlaid by copy (tests/oracle/*.py + cassettes/*). 871 keys in CONFIG_DEFAULTS, 12 model keys in MODEL_KEY_DEFAULTS. No SecretStr anywhere in src/. Coercion (int/float/==\"1\") happens at call sites, not in the config layer."
